The small choices add up. The cup you carry. The waste you avoid. The way you choose to start your day.

This winter season, make every drink count with an Ecoffee Cup®. Designed for everyday use and made to replace single-use cups, it’s a simple switch that feels good in your hands and better for the planet.

Choose reusable. Choose better. Choose it every day.

#EcoffeeCupSA #ConsciousLiving #ChooseReusable #SustainableChoices #LessWasteMoreTaste

What a fantastic weekend with @coffeefestivalco on the rooftop! It was a pleasure meeting so many passionate coffee lovers and business owners, making so many new connections along the way. Thank you to everyone who stopped by our stand to chat, explore our range, and discover how reusable cups can make a lasting impact.

Available in 250ml, 350ml and 400ml sizes, our reusable cups are designed to showcase your brand while becoming a favourite part of your customers' daily routine. Ready to create something beautiful, sustainable, and uniquely yours? We'd love to help -.

#SustainableStyle #EcoffeeCup #choosetoreuse #ecoffeecupSA

Every year, over 300 billion single-use cups are produced, and less than 2% are recycled. That’s why Ecoffee Cup® was created: a stylish, reusable alternative designed to support conscious living and everyday refill culture. Because small daily choices can make a meaningful difference.

Every again is a gain.

#EcoffeeCup #ChooseToReuse #EndSingleUse #ReusableRevolution

Some mornings feel like a full marathon before 8am 🤍
Lunchboxes, emails, laundry, school runs… and somewhere in between trying to nourish myself too.
This strawberry chocolate protein smoothie has been my current go-to because it’s quick, filling and tastes like a treat while still packed with goodness 🍓🍫
My kitchen MVP lately? My @kuvings_sa nutriblender ￼ making smoothies in minutes, and my reusable @ecoffeecup.sa keeping mom life a little easier on the go ☕️ Balanced, realistic nutrition for real life.
No perfection. Just small nourishing habits that fit into busy days.
Wie sê gesond eet moet complicated wees? 🇿🇦✨
:
Strawberry Chocolate Protein Smoothie 🍓🍫
Ingredients
* 1 cup frozen strawberries
* 1 small banana
* 1 tbsp cocoa powder
* 1 scoop chocolate protein powder
Additionally for extra nutrition and satiety 
* 1 tbsp peanut butter or almond butter
* 1 tbsp oats
* 1 tsp chia seeds
* 1 cup milk of choice
* Handful ice
* Optional: espresso shot for a mocha twist ☕️
Method
1. Add everything to your  Kuvings South Africa￼ blender and blend until smooth and creamy.
2. Pour into your reusable  Ecoffee Cup South Africa￼ cup and head out the door ✨
:
#KuvingsSA #EcoffeeCup #ProteinSmoothie #MomLife #HealthyHabits

The single-use cup stops here.

We make reuse work in the real world: delivering a simple, fully supported system for vendors, and an effortless, rewarding experience for customers.

Whether you’re a café, event, workplace, or retailer, partnering with Ecoffee Cup®️ means taking practical steps toward reducing single-use waste without compromising on convenience or customer experience.

If you’d like to partner with us to become a reuse champion, please contact our marketing team today: sales@ecoffeecup.co.za

Whether you’re looking to move away from single-use, or simply want a reusable cup as part of your merchandise offering, there’s an Ecoffee Cup®️ to suit your brand, your team, and your coffee culture.

See you there!

Your brand deserves more than a static presence. With a custom branded Ecoffee Cup®, your message moves through daily routines: from morning coffee runs to busy commutes and everything in between. It becomes part of real life, carried into meetings, conversations, workplaces and moments that matter.

This is branding with purpose: practical, reusable, and seen again and again.
Put your brand in people’s hands. Enquire about custom branding (website link in bio).

#EcoBranding #CorporateGifting #SustainableStyle #EcoffeeCup #choosetoreuse #ecoffeecupSA

“Have nothing in your house that you do not know to be useful or believe to be beautiful.” – William Morris

The William Morris Gallery range by Ecoffee Cup® celebrates this timeless philosophy. Inspired by one of Victorian Britain’s most influential cultural figures, these cups combine classic patterns, thoughtful design, and everyday functionality.

Explore the collection and bring a touch of artistry to every sip (website link in bio).

Small shifts in the office can say a lot about a company.

Swapping single-use cups for reusables during meetings and coffee breaks is simple, visible, and starts to add up - quietly shaping a culture that values sustainability.

Small actions. Big impact.

#ecoffeecupSA #SipSustainably #DitchTheDisposables  #choosetoreuse #BrewedAwakening

Imagine a timeline where Vincent van Gogh and William Morris would be able to talk about "art from the people, for the people" over a cup of coffee.

Creativity can inspire connection, spark conversation, and even drive social change. 

This is the spirit Ecoffee Cup® aims to bring to your daily ritual. Every sip is a small act of conscious choice, blending artistry with sustainability. Choose your art. Sip with purpose. Make your impact.

#ChooseToReuse #ArtMeetsAction #EcoffeeCup
